name: Sweetish Hill's Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Line two 12-cup muffin tins with paper liners or carefully butter and flour the cups.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: cake flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, powdered milk, salt, and baking powder.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the wet ingredients: canola oil, egg, and water.
5. Reserve some blueberries for later.
6. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the wet mixture. Mix with a wooden spoon or silicone spatula just until combined. Do not over mix.
7. Gently fold in the reserved blueberries.
8. Using an ice cream scoop, fill each muffin cup almost to the top.
9. Bake in the middle of the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
10. Turn the muffins out onto a wire rack and let cool. Makes about 24 muffins.
